title: At the Doctor's Office
description: Healthcare conversation. Useful vocabulary for visits.

segments.text: What seems to be the problem?
I have had a sore throat for three days and a slight fever.
It does look a bit red.
Take one tablet twice a day with food.

transcript: Good morning. What seems to be the problem? I have had a sore throat for three days and a slight fever. Have you been taking anything? Just some warm tea. Let me have a look. Open wide. It does look a bit red. I will prescribe an antibiotic. Take one tablet twice a day with food. Thank you, doctor.
